author: @psychology.podcast
description: Giai thich tam ly doi song bang ngon ngu gan gui, khong chan doan va khong thay the tu van chuyen mon
style: Calm reflective podcast visuals, warm studio lighting, abstract emotional metaphors, soft cinematic atmosphere
recurring_locations: Warm podcast studio with microphone, book stack, soft lamp, and neutral wall
Quiet therapy-inspired room with comfortable chair, plants, and diffused window light
Minimal abstract scene with paper notes, journal, and soft shadows
Evening desk with open notebook, tea cup, and calm ambient lighting

episodes.topic: Vi sao chung ta tri hoan va cach bat dau bang mot buoc rat nho
Ranh gioi ca nhan la gi va cach noi khong ma khong thay co loi
Tu doi thoai noi tam den su binh yen trong nhung ngay ap luc
